final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [15:0] din, // data input
    output reg [15:0] dout // data output
);

    reg [15:0] unused_memory; // 16-bit unused_memory cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            unused_memory <= din; // Write data to unused_memory
        end
        dout <= unused_memory; // Always output stored unused_memory
    end
endmodule
